name: raycast-pwgen
title: PWGen
description: Generate secure passwords in Raycast by delegating all password generation to the pwgen CLI.
author: thomas

preferences.name: pwgenPath
preferences.title: pwgen Executable Path
preferences.description: Optional absolute path to the pwgen executable. Set this when Raycast cannot find pwgen on PATH.

commands.name: generate
commands.title: Generate Password
commands.description: Generate secure passwords with the pwgen CLI
